positive: A stylized, highly detailed composition featuring a crescent moon embracing a cluster of iridescent luminous stars and blooming cosmic flora. The arrangement is symmetrically balanced and centrally composed, perfect for an apparel print. Use an Art Deco or Nouveau graphic style with strong, clean silhouettes and thick defining lines. The color palette should be limited to deep midnight blues, glowing teal, ethereal lavender, and stark gold accents. The foreground elements should have solid, saturated color blocks against a slightly darker gradient background. Intricate, repeating celestial patterns should frame the central subject. Graphic illustration, high contrast, vector art quality, clean linework, print design.
negative: photorealism, gradient noise, blurry, lowres, noisy, watermark, text, logo, signature, dirty, stained, bad anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts
